title: Target assessor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:TargetAss-TSL.jpg|thumb|right]]
The '''target assessor''' was a type of combat headband which assisted the wearer in the use of ranged weapons. Though not as powerful as its multi-spectral cousin, the target assessor could be used by almost anyone, as no training was required.

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-12-21 -->[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords'': Prima Official Game Guide]]
